title: Tawakkal Watches
description: Complete online store with product catalog, checkout, and order management.
challenge: The business needed a complete online selling system where products could be displayed properly, customers could place orders smoothly, and the backend could handle operations without confusion.
built: Admin panel for products, users, and orders
Backend for full control of operations
result: The business now has a structured online store with centralized product and order management, making daily operations smoother and more scalable.

testimonial.text: Infatech helped us take our watch business online in a very structured way. The website is easy for customers to use, and the backend makes it simple for us to manage orders and products.
testimonial.name: Abdul Aziz Budhani

title: Jannatni Chavio
description: Islamic mobile application designed for daily usage, content access, and seamless user experience across Android and iOS.
challenge: The client wanted to build an Islamic mobile application that works smoothly on both Android and iOS, allowing users to access religious content easily while ensuring the system remains simple to manage from the backend.
built: Clean and user-friendly interface for daily use
Admin panel to manage content and updates
Backend system to support app performance and data handling
result: The app now serves as a reliable digital platform for users to access Islamic content easily. It also gives the client full control over managing and updating content through a structured admin panel.

testimonial.text: Infatech helped us build a smooth and user-friendly Islamic app for both Android and iPhone. The backend system makes it very easy for us to manage and update our content.
testimonial.name: Rizwanali Palsaniya

title: Best Properties Mumbai
description: Property listing platform with filters and inquiry system.
challenge: The client needed a platform where properties could be listed properly, users could filter their search, and inquiries could be captured efficiently.
built: Property filters and detailed project pages
Admin panel to manage listings and leads
Backend system for smooth content and lead management
result: The platform now makes it easier for users to discover properties and for the business to handle leads in a more structured way.

testimonial.text: Infatech created a platform that made our listings much more organized and user-friendly. The backend also helps us manage leads and property updates with ease.
testimonial.name: Mukhtar Sheliya
